gaps: No AI-specific risk assessment or impact assessment process defined
Missing transparency, explainability, and audit logging for AI-driven decisions
No continual improvement or performance monitoring framework for the AI system itself
Insufficient human oversight and accountability mechanisms beyond basic escalation
recommendations: Implement ISO/IEC 42001 Clause 6 risk management and impact assessment procedures
Add decision explainability and immutable AI audit trails aligned with ALCOA+
Establish ongoing AI performance metrics, bias monitoring, and retraining controls
Define formal human-in-the-loop oversight and escalation governance per Clause 5

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained
